issuesFound.fix: Line: Add `setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');` immediately after `addClass(document.body, CSS.navOpen);` in the open function.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav.close missing aria-expanded update
issuesFound.explanation: When the mobile navigation drawer closes, the trigger button's aria-expanded attribute is not set to 'false'. Screen readers cannot announce the collapsed state.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Add `setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');` immediately after `removeClass(document.body, CSS.navOpen);` in the close function.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu._openInstance missing aria-expanded update
issuesFound.explanation: The dropdown trigger button does not update its aria-expanded attribute to 'true' when the panel opens, failing to communicate the expanded state to assistive technologies.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Add `setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');` immediately after `inst.open = true;` in the _openInstance function.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu._closeInstance missing aria-expanded update
issuesFound.explanation: The dropdown trigger button does not update its aria-expanded attribute to 'false' when the panel closes.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Add `setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');` immediately after `inst.open = false;` in the _closeInstance function.

issuesFound.title: siteSearch._open missing aria-expanded update on combobox
issuesFound.explanation: The search input acts as a combobox but does not set aria-expanded='true' when the suggestion listbox opens, violating the ARIA combobox pattern and preventing screen readers from announcing the expanded state.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Add `if (_inputEl) setAttr(_inputEl, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');` immediately after `_searchState.open = true;` in the _open function.

issuesFound.title: siteSearch._close missing aria-expanded update on combobox
issuesFound.explanation: The search input does not set aria-expanded='false' when the suggestion listbox closes.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Add `if (_inputEl) setAttr(_inputEl, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');` immediately after `_searchState.open = false;` in the _close function.

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion.open missing aria-expanded update
issuesFound.explanation: When an FAQ accordion item is expanded, the trigger button's aria-expanded attribute is not set to 'true', preventing screen readers from announcing the expanded state.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Add `setAttr(item.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');` immediately after `item.open = true;` in the open function.

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markValid missing aria-invalid removal
issuesFound.explanation: When clearing validation errors from a field, the function removes the error description from aria-describedby but does not remove or set aria-invalid to 'false', leaving the field incorrectly marked as invalid.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Add `removeAttr(field, ARIA.INVALID);` or `setAttr(field, ARIA.INVALID, 'false');` in the else branch after updating aria-describedby in the markValid function.

issuesFound.title: productFilter._syncTabAriaStates missing aria-selected
issuesFound.explanation: Filter tab buttons indicate their active state visually via CSS but do not expose this state to screen readers via aria-selected, making it impossible for users to know which filter is currently active.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Add `setAttr(btn, ARIA.SELECTED, String(isActive));` immediately after `toggleClass(btn, CSS.active, isActive);` in the _syncTabAriaStates function.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav.close missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: When the mobile navigation menu closes, no announcement is made to screen readers, leaving users unaware that the menu has closed and focus may have moved.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.navClosed || 'Navigation menu closed');` before the closing brace of the close function.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu open/close missing live region announcements
issuesFound.explanation: Opening and closing dropdown menus changes the visible content but does not announce these changes to screen readers via a live region.
issuesFound.fix: Line: In _openInstance, add `liveRegion.announce('Menu opened');` after opening. In _closeInstance, add `liveRegion.announce('Menu closed');` after closing.

issuesFound.title: productFilter.applyFilters missing result announcement
issuesFound.explanation: When filters are applied, the updated product count is visible but not announced to screen readers, leaving users unaware that the filter has been applied or how many results are showing.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Add `liveRegion.announce(`${totalMatches} products found`);` after `_updateCountBadge(totalMatches);` in the filterAnimation.run callback.

issuesFound.title: pricing.setPeriod missing billing period announcement
issuesFound.explanation: When users toggle between monthly and annual billing, the price updates visually but the change is not announced to screen readers.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Add `liveRegion.announce(`Billing period changed to ${period}`);` after `_syncToggleState(period);` in the setPeriod function.

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion open/close missing live region announcements
issuesFound.explanation: Expanding and collapsing FAQ items changes the content but does not announce the state change or the item title to screen readers.
issuesFound.fix: Line: In open function, add `liveRegion.announce(`${item.question} expanded`);`. In close function, add `liveRegion.announce(`${item.question} collapsed`);`.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu _openInstance function does not update aria-expanded on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: The dropdownMenu._openInstance() function removes the hidden attribute and adds the open class to the panel, but does not call setAttr() to update aria-expanded to 'true' on inst.trigger. The ARIA state remains stale, preventing screen reader users from knowing the dropdown is expanded.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2085: setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu _closeInstance function does not update aria-expanded on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: The dropdownMenu._closeInstance() function removes the open class and hides the panel after transition, but does not call setAttr() to update aria-expanded to 'false' on inst.trigger. The ARIA state remains stale, preventing screen reader users from knowing the dropdown is collapsed.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2105: setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion open function does not set aria-expanded="true" on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: The faqAccordion.open() function adds the open class, animates the panel height, and manages multi-open behaviour, but does not call setAttr() to set aria-expanded="true" on item.trigger. The close() function correctly sets aria-expanded="false", creating an asymmetry that leaves screen reader users unaware when an FAQ item is expanded.
issuesFound.fix: Line 4725: setAttr(item.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markInvalid does not set aria-invalid="true" on invalid fields
issuesFound.explanation: The srUtils.markInvalid() function calls addDescribedBy() to link the error message element via aria-describedby, but does not set aria-invalid="true" on the field itself. Without aria-invalid, assistive technologies do not recognise the field as being in an error state, even though the error message is associated.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1375: setAttr(field, ARIA.INVALID, 'true');

issuesFound.title: productFilter applyFilters does not announce filter changes via live region
issuesFound.explanation: The productFilter.applyFilters() function updates the product grid visibility, count badge, and empty state, then emits a custom 'filter:applied' event. However, no call to liveRegion.announce() is made to inform screen reader users that the filter has been applied and the results have changed. Users are left unaware that their action produced a result.
issuesFound.fix: Line 3995: liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.filterApplied(s.activeCategory) || `${totalMatches} products shown`);

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu trigger missing aria-expanded update
issuesFound.explanation: Dropdown menu triggers do not have their aria-expanded attribute updated when panels open or close. Assistive technologies cannot track the visibility state of the dropdown panels.
issuesFound.fix:
Line _openInstance(): Add `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` after `inst.open = true;`
  Line _closeInstance(): Add `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` after `inst.open = false;`

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion trigger missing aria-expanded update
issuesFound.explanation: FAQ accordion triggers do not update aria-expanded when items expand or collapse. Screen readers cannot announce the expanded/collapsed state of FAQ panels.
issuesFound.fix:
Line open(): Add `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` after `item.open = true;`
  Line close(): Add `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` after `item.open = false;`

issuesFound.title: pricing module missing live region announcement for price changes
issuesFound.explanation: When the billing period toggle changes (monthly/annual), prices update visually but are not announced to screen readers. Users may not perceive that prices have changed.
issuesFound.fix:
Line setPeriod(): After `emit(document, 'pricing:periodchange', ...);`, add:
  `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.pricingPeriodChanged || `Prices updated to ${BILLING_PERIODS[period].label} billing`);`

issuesFound.title: inlineValidator not setting aria-invalid on validation errors
issuesFound.explanation: When form validation fails, the module adds error classes and aria-describedby but never sets aria-invalid="true" on the invalid field. When validation passes, it does not clear aria-invalid. Screen readers cannot identify invalid fields.
issuesFound.fix:
Line _renderResult() (invalid branch): After `addClass(field, CSS.fieldInvalid);`, add `setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'true');`
  Line _renderResult() (valid branch): After `removeClass(field, CSS.fieldInvalid);`, add `removeAttr(field, 'aria-invalid');` or `setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'false');`

issuesFound.title: contactForm validation missing aria-invalid reflection
issuesFound.explanation: The contact form uses inlineValidator which fails to set aria-invalid on fields when validation errors occur. This affects all contact form inputs (full_name, email, subject, message, consent).
issuesFound.fix:
Line contactForm.init(): Ensure inlineValidator is patched per Issue 6, or manually set aria-invalid in _validateAll() when errors are found:
  `errors.forEach(({ field }) => setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'true'));`
  And clear in _showSuccess(): `CONTACT_FIELDS.forEach(cfg => { const f = qs(cfg.selector, _formEl); if(f) removeAttr(f, 'aria-invalid'); });`

issuesFound.title: newsletterForm validation missing aria-invalid reflection
issuesFound.explanation: The newsletter form email input does not receive aria-invalid="true" when validation fails because inlineValidator omits this attribute.
issuesFound.fix:
Line newsletterForm.init(): After `inlineValidator.bind(_emailEl, ['required', 'email']);`, add manual validation in _onSubmit before submission:
  `if (!result.valid) { setAttr(_emailEl, 'aria-invalid', 'true'); _emailEl.focus(); return; } else { removeAttr(_emailEl, 'aria-invalid'); }`

issuesFound.title: multiStepWizard validation missing aria-invalid reflection
issuesFound.explanation: Wizard step validation uses inlineValidator which does not set aria-invalid on invalid fields within the current step.
issuesFound.fix: Line _validateCurrentStep(): In the error loop, add `setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'true');` and in success case add `removeAttr(field, 'aria-invalid');` for each validated field.

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion triggers missing Enter/Space keyboard activation
issuesFound.explanation: FAQ triggers that are not native button elements (e.g., divs with role="button") cannot be activated with Enter or Space keys because the keydown handler only handles Arrow keys, Home, and End.
issuesFound.fix:
Line _onKeydown(): Add case for Enter and Space:
  `case KEYS.ENTER: case KEYS.SPACE: { e.preventDefault(); toggle(item); break; }`
  Ensure the handler is bound to the trigger elements, not just the container.

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion missing live region announcement for state changes
issuesFound.explanation: When FAQ items expand or collapse, no announcement is made to screen readers. Users may not realize the content has changed.
issuesFound.fix:
Line open(): After `emit(_containerEl, 'faq:open', { item });`, add:
  `if (announceToSR !== false) liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.faqOpened || `${item.question} expanded`);`
  Line close(): After `emit(_containerEl, 'faq:close', { item });`, add:
  `if (announceToSR !== false) liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.faqClosed || `${item.question} collapsed`);`

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: Dropdown menu open/close actions are not announced to screen readers, leaving users unaware that content has appeared or disappeared.
issuesFound.fix:
Line _openInstance(): After `emit(inst.trigger, 'dropdown:open', ...);`, add:
  `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.dropdownOpened || 'Menu opened');`
  Line _closeInstance(): After `emit(inst.trigger, 'dropdown:close', ...);`, add:
  `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.dropdownClosed || 'Menu closed');`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav drawer not removed from accessibility tree when closed
issuesFound.explanation: When the mobile navigation drawer closes, it remains in the accessibility tree without aria-hidden="true", potentially allowing screen reader users to navigate to off-screen content.
issuesFound.fix:
Line close(): After `removeClass(_drawer, CONFIG.navigation.openClass || CSS.open);`, add:
  `setAttr(_drawer, 'aria-hidden', 'true');`
  Line open(): After opening, add `removeAttr(_drawer, 'aria-hidden');` or `setAttr(_drawer, 'aria-hidden', 'false');`

fpTitles: contactForm validation missing aria-invalid reflection
newsletterForm validation missing aria-invalid reflection

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markInvalid does not set aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: The markInvalid utility function links an error message to a field via aria-describedby but fails to set aria-invalid="true" on the field. Screen readers rely on aria-invalid to convey that a field contains an error.
issuesFound.fix: Line 800 (in markInvalid): Add `setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'true');` after `addDescribedBy(field, errorEl);`.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav toggle functions do not update aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The mobileNav.open and mobileNav.close functions toggle the navigation drawer visibility but never update the aria-expanded attribute on the trigger button to reflect the open/closed state. Screen readers will not announce the current state of the menu to users.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1150 (in open function): Add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` after `_open = true;`. Line 1175 (in close function): Add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` after `_open = false;`.

issuesFound.title: productFilter changes not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: The applyFilters function updates the visible product cards and the count badge but does not announce the filter results (e.g., "Showing 5 products") via an aria-live region. Screen reader users are not informed that the content has changed or how many results are visible.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2350 (in applyFilters): After `_updateCountBadge(totalMatches);`, add `liveRegion.announce(`${totalMatches} products found`);` or similar announcement.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu toggle functions do not update aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The _openInstance and _closeInstance functions in dropdownMenu show and hide the dropdown panels but fail to update aria-expanded on the trigger buttons. This prevents assistive technologies from announcing whether the dropdown is expanded or collapsed.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1250 (in _openInstance): Add `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` after `inst.open = true;`. Line 1260 (in _closeInstance): Add `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` after `inst.open = false;`.

issuesFound.title: pricing period changes not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: The setPeriod function updates price displays across all plan cards when switching between monthly and annual billing but does not announce the change via a live region. Screen reader users are unaware that prices have updated across the page.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2600 (in setPeriod): After updating the prices, add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.pricingAnnual || 'Prices switched to annual billing');` (or monthly equivalent based on the period).

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion open function does not set aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: When an FAQ item is opened via the open() function, the code animates the panel and updates classes but does not set aria-expanded="true" on the trigger button. Although the close() function sets aria-expanded="false", the asymmetric update leaves screen readers unaware when content is expanded.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2800 (in open function): Add `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` after `item.open = true;`.

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markValid does not clear aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: The markValid utility function removes the error description from aria-describedby but does not reset aria-invalid to "false" or remove the attribute. Fields remain marked as invalid to assistive technologies even after being corrected.
issuesFound.fix: Line 810 (in markValid): Add `setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'false');` or `removeAttr(field, 'aria-invalid');` at the end of the function.

issuesFound.title: productFilter tab buttons do not update aria-pressed
issuesFound.explanation: The _syncTabAriaStates function updates the active CSS class on filter tab buttons but does not update the aria-pressed attribute to indicate the pressed state. Since these buttons behave as toggle buttons (showing the active filter), they must communicate their state via aria-pressed.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2400 (in _syncTabAriaStates): Add `setAttr(btn, 'aria-pressed', String(isActive));` inside the forEach loop after `toggleClass(btn, CSS.active, isActive);`.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav trigger missing aria-controls initialization
issuesFound.explanation: During initialization, the mobileNav module queries the trigger button and drawer elements but does not establish an aria-controls relationship between them. Users cannot identify which element the trigger controls.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1200 (in init function): After `_drawer = qs(...);`, add `if (_drawer && _drawer.id) setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-controls', _drawer.id);` or use `srUtils.ensureId(_drawer, 'nav-drawer')` to ensure an ID exists first.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav drawer missing focus trap activation
issuesFound.explanation: When the mobile navigation drawer opens, the code does not activate a focus trap to contain keyboard focus within the drawer. Keyboard users can tab out of the modal drawer into the background content, violating WCAG focus management requirements for modal dialogs.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1150 (in open function): After opening the drawer, add focus trap activation code: `if (_trap) _trap.activate();` (assuming _trap is initialized via createFocusTrap in init).

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion state changes not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: The open and close functions in faqAccordion expand and collapse FAQ panels but do not announce the state change via a live region. While focus management helps, users benefit from confirmation that the action succeeded, especially when the content is below the fold.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2800 (in open): Add `liveRegion.announce(`${item.question} expanded`);`. Line 2820 (in close): Add `liveRegion.announce(`${item.question} collapsed`);`.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav toggle functions do not update aria-expanded on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: The `mobileNav.open()` and `mobileNav.close()` functions toggle the navigation drawer visibility and CSS classes but fail to update the `aria-expanded` attribute on the trigger button (`_trigger`). Screen reader users will not be informed when the menu state changes.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 1630: setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, true);
  Line 1650: setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, false);

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu toggle functions do not update aria-expanded on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: The `dropdownMenu._openInstance()` and `dropdownMenu._closeInstance()` functions manage the panel visibility but do not update the `aria-expanded` attribute on the trigger element (`inst.trigger`). This breaks the disclosure pattern for assistive technology.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 1830: setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, true);
  Line 1850: setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, false);

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion.open function does not update aria-expanded on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: The `faqAccordion.open()` function expands the answer panel but fails to set `aria-expanded="true"` on the question trigger (`item.trigger`). The `close()` function correctly sets it to "false", creating an inconsistent state where AT cannot detect the open action.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2750: setAttr(item.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, true);

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markInvalid does not set aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: The `srUtils.markInvalid()` function links the error message via `aria-describedby` but fails to set `aria-invalid="true"` on the field. Assistive technologies rely on `aria-invalid` to announce that a field has an error state.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1380: field.setAttribute('aria-invalid', 'true');

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markValid does not reset aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: The `srUtils.markValid()` function removes the error description but does not remove or reset the `aria-invalid` attribute to "false". The field may remain stuck in an invalid state for assistive technology even after correction.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1400: field.removeAttribute('aria-invalid');

issuesFound.title: productFilter.applyFilters does not announce count updates via live region
issuesFound.explanation: The `productFilter.applyFilters()` function updates the product count badge and visibility of cards dynamically but does not announce these changes to screen readers via an `aria-live` region. Users are unaware that the content has refreshed.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2380: liveRegion.announce(`${totalMatches} product${totalMatches !== 1 ? 's' : ''} found`);

issuesFound.title: pricing.setPeriod does not announce price updates via live region
issuesFound.explanation: The `pricing.setPeriod()` function updates the displayed prices and savings messages when the billing period changes but does not announce this change to screen readers. Users may not realize the prices have updated to reflect the new period.
issuesFound.fix: Line 3250: liveRegion.announce(`Prices switched to ${period} billing`);

issuesFound.fix: Line productFilter.applyFilters(): After `_updateCountBadge(totalMatches);` add `liveRegion.announce(\`Showing \${totalMatches} products\`);`

issuesFound.title: Site search combobox missing aria-expanded updates
issuesFound.explanation: The search input acts as a combobox but does not toggle aria-expanded when the suggestion listbox opens or closes. Screen readers cannot inform users when the listbox is visible or hidden.

issuesFound.title: Pricing change not announced to screen readers
issuesFound.explanation: When users switch between monthly and annual billing, the price updates visually but the change is not announced to screen readers. Users may not realize the prices have changed or what the new amounts are.
issuesFound.fix: Line pricing.setPeriod(): After `planDataParser.getAll().forEach(plan => _updatePlanCard(plan, period));` add `liveRegion.announce(\`Prices switched to \${BILLING_PERIODS[period].label} billing\`);`

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu missing aria-expanded initialization
issuesFound.explanation: When registering dropdown triggers, the code sets aria-haspopup and aria-controls but fails to initialize aria-expanded to false for collapsed dropdowns on page load.
issuesFound.fix: Line dropdownMenu.register(): After `setAttr(trigger, ARIA.CONTROLS, panelId);` add `setAttr(trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, false);`

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation open/close not announced
issuesFound.explanation: Opening and closing the mobile navigation drawer changes the visible content significantly but does not announce the state change via a live region. Screen reader users may not know the navigation has opened or closed.

issuesFound.title: Site search missing aria-expanded initialization
issuesFound.explanation: The search input is configured as a combobox with aria-controls and aria-haspopup, but aria-expanded is not initialized to false when the page loads and the suggestion list is hidden.
issuesFound.fix: Line siteSearch.init(): After `setAttr(input, ARIA.HASPOPUP, 'listbox');` add `setAttr(input, ARIA.EXPANDED, false);`

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu open/close not announced
issuesFound.explanation: Opening and closing dropdown menus updates the visible UI but does not announce the state change via a live region, leaving screen reader users unaware that content has appeared or disappeared.

issuesFound.title: Active filter chip removal not announced
issuesFound.explanation: When users remove an active filter chip, the product grid updates but the removal action and the updated result count are not announced to screen readers.
issuesFound.fix: Line activeFilterChips._onChipClick(): After the switch statement handling removal, add `liveRegion.announce(\`Filter removed. \${productFilter.getState().activeCategory} products showing.\`);`

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation lacks focus trap and focus return
issuesFound.explanation: When the mobile navigation opens, focus is not trapped within the drawer, allowing users to tab behind the overlay. When closed, focus is not returned to the trigger button. This violates WCAG 2.4.3 Focus Order.
issuesFound.fix: Line mobileNav.open(): Add `const trap = createFocusTrap(_drawer, { returnFocus: _trigger }); trap.activate(); _trap = trap;` Line mobileNav.close(): Add `if (_trap) { _trap.deactivate(); _trap = null; }`

issuesFound.title: Character counter not associated with input via aria-describedby
issuesFound.explanation: The character counter creates a live region status element but does not link it to the input field using aria-describedby, so screen readers may not announce the character count context when the field is focused.
issuesFound.fix: Line characterCounter.attach(): After `insertRef.parentElement.insertBefore(counterEl, insertRef.nextSibling || null);` add `srUtils.addDescribedBy(field, counterEl);`

issuesFound.title: TextInput component missing aria-invalid prop
issuesFound.explanation: The TextInput component accepts an invalid prop to style the field with an error class but fails to programmatically mark the field as invalid using aria-invalid. Screen reader users cannot identify that the field contains an error.
issuesFound.fix: Line 855-861: <input id={id} aria-invalid={invalid ? 'true' : undefined} className={['form-input', invalid ? 'form-input--error' : '', className].filter(Boolean).join(' ')} {...rest} />

issuesFound.title: MobileNav backdrop div not keyboard accessible
issuesFound.explanation: The backdrop element has an onClick handler but lacks role="button", tabIndex={0}, and keyboard event handlers, making it inaccessible to keyboard users who cannot click to close the navigation.
issuesFound.fix: Line 775: <div className="mobile-nav-backdrop" onClick={onClose} onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Escape' && onClose()} role="button" aria-label="Close navigation" tabIndex={0} />

issuesFound.title: SiteHeader mobile navigation toggle missing aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation toggle button controls the visibility of the mobile menu via `isOpen` but lacks `aria-expanded`. Assistive technology users are not informed of the menu state.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1075: <button id={toggleId} ref={menuToggleRef} type="button" aria-controls={menuId} aria-expanded={isOpen} aria-label={isOpen ? 'Close navigation menu' : 'Open navigation menu'} className="mobile-nav-toggle" onClick={isOpen ? close : open}>

issuesFound.title: MobileNav submenu trigger missing aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The button toggling mobile submenu sections controls visibility via `isExpanded` but lacks `aria-expanded`. Users cannot detect if the submenu is open.
issuesFound.fix: Line 935: <button type="button" aria-controls={sectionId} aria-expanded={isExpanded} className="mobile-nav__link mobile-nav__link--trigger" onClick={() => setOpenSectionId(isExpanded ? null : item.href)}>

issuesFound.title: HeroSection video toggle button missing aria-pressed
issuesFound.explanation: The button toggles the background video play state (`isPlaying`) but lacks `aria-pressed`. It functions as a toggle but does not communicate its pressed state to assistive technology.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1265: <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" aria-pressed={isPlaying} aria-label={isPlaying ? 'Pause background video' : 'Play background video'} onClick={handleTogglePlay} className="hero-section__video-toggle">

issuesFound.title: BillingToggle monthly button missing aria-pressed
issuesFound.explanation: The button represents a selected state in a toggle group (`value === 'monthly'`) but lacks `aria-pressed`. Users cannot identify which billing period is active.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1635: <button type="button" id="billing-monthly" aria-pressed={value === 'monthly'} className={['billing-toggle__btn', value === 'monthly' ? 'billing-toggle__btn--active' : ''].filter(Boolean).join(' ')} onClick={() => onChange('monthly')}>

issuesFound.title: BillingToggle annual button missing aria-pressed
issuesFound.explanation: The button represents a selected state in a toggle group (`value === 'annual'`) but lacks `aria-pressed`. Users cannot identify which billing period is active.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1643: <button type="button" id="billing-annual" aria-pressed={value === 'annual'} className={['billing-toggle__btn', value === 'annual' ? 'billing-toggle__btn--active' : ''].filter(Boolean).join(' ')} onClick={() => onChange('annual')}>

issuesFound.title: DesktopNav chevron icon missing aria-hidden
issuesFound.explanation: The chevron span contains visual arrows (▲/▼) that convey no additional information beyond the button state. It should be hidden from assistive technology to prevent noise.
issuesFound.fix: Line 842: <span aria-hidden="true" className="nav-link__chevron">

issuesFound.title: DesktopNav landmark missing accessible name
issuesFound.explanation: The primary navigation `<nav>` element lacks an `aria-label`. Since there are multiple nav landmarks on the page (Mobile, Footer), this one needs a distinct name for navigation.
issuesFound.fix: Line 825: <nav id="main-nav" aria-label="Main navigation" className="desktop-nav">

issuesFound.title: MobileNav body landmark missing accessible name
issuesFound.explanation: The navigation `<nav>` inside the mobile panel lacks an `aria-label`. It should be distinguished from other navigation landmarks on the page.
issuesFound.fix: Line 925: <nav aria-label="Mobile navigation" className="mobile-nav__body">

issuesFound.title: HeroSection section missing accessible name
issuesFound.explanation: The hero `<section>` lacks `aria-labelledby` or `aria-label`. It should reference its internal heading (`hero-heading`) to be identifiable as a landmark region.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1235: <section aria-labelledby="hero-heading" className="hero-section">

issuesFound.title: StatsBar section missing accessible name
issuesFound.explanation: The statistics `<section>` lacks `aria-labelledby` or `aria-label`. It should reference its internal heading (`stats-heading`) to be identifiable as a landmark region.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1335: <section aria-labelledby="stats-heading" className="stats-bar">

issuesFound.title: PlanCard article missing accessible name
issuesFound.explanation: The `<article>` representing a pricing plan lacks `aria-labelledby`. It should reference the plan name heading (`headingId`) inside it for screen reader navigation.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1685: <article aria-labelledby={headingId} className="pricing-card__article">

issuesFound.title: PlanCard primary CTA link missing accessible name with item context
issuesFound.explanation: The CTA link text (e.g., "Start Pro free trial") does not include the plan name. In a grid of similar links, this causes ambiguity. An `aria-label` including the plan name is required.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1735: <a href={plan.ctaHref} aria-label={`${plan.ctaLabel} for ${plan.name}`} className={['btn', plan.featured ? 'btn--primary' : 'btn--outline', 'btn--md',].filter(Boolean).join(' ')}>
